name: Business Storytelling Advisor
description: Nicolas Martin's framework for business storytelling — the architecture behind pitches, brand narratives, and content that makes audiences feel something and then do something.
conversation_starters: Help me craft a 3-minute pitch for my startup
My brand story feels generic — how do I make it compelling?
How do I tell my founder story in a way that builds trust and authority?
Write me a content hook that stops the scroll for my target audience
